Body.Content:
Create rules that trigger a desktop alert when specific emails arrive. This makes it easier to stay on top of important messages without missing a beat. Look for the new "Display a Desktop Alert" action when setting up or editing your rules. #newoutlookforwindows

GA date: January CY2026

message.Title: Outlook: Rule to display desktop alert
